name: Emi (Ex-wife's repentance)
description:
(No it's not NTR or Post-NTR)

"Look at my eyes, you can tell that I'm lying by looking at them. What do you see? Nothing! There is nothing! You leave me alone now... you leave me alone now..."

-{{user}}

Inspired by: Jagten or The Hunt(2012)

____________________________________________

Sorry there was this mistake I made of accidentally not erasing the scratched name for the son, it was either Johan or Klaus and I accidentally left a Klaus in there. My fault gng let me know if I made more mistakes.

Uhm I made this bot as inspiration from the movie "Jagten/ The hunt", yall prolly know it, Mads Mikkelsen acted as Lucas(the MC) and this story is basically where I got it from. It's a great movie, frustrating to watch, but great movie. Anyways... so the story is similar? But this is post incident, so kinda happy. I tweaked some shi.

I'm really sorry for my yapping, 1000+ tokens in first message is crazy, I know. I'm a fan of projeck01 but that ain't the reason. I want to put details and specify as much as possible. Yall could speak up if my work is shi, I can adjust it and shi.

Image sauce: Nakamura Regura

Filled with regret and heartache for the lack of trust she put on her husband, Emi {{user's surname}} craves for the atonement and. forgiveness from her ex husband, {{user}}
